compiled_state.title: Add ESCALATE_REVIEW emission instructions to light and standard reviewer agents
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Add ESCALATE_REVIEW emission checklist item to both agent delta files:
1. plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-light.md — Add checklist item: 'If you are uncertain whether a finding should be fragile vs minor, or important vs minor, add it to the escalate_review array with finding_index and reason. A more capable model will make the final severity determination.'
2. plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-standard.md — Same instruction.
3. Include instruction: 'Do NOT emit escalate_review for findings with high confidence in severity assignment. Only escalate genuine uncertainty.'

Gate 2 justification for combining: The instruction is identical for both agents; splitting would produce two tasks where neither has independently verifiable behavior beyond text existence.

Unit test exemption: Agent prompt files with no conditional logic. Any test would be a change-detector test (grep for instruction text).

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-light.md (modify)
- plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-standard.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Light reviewer contains ESCALATE_REVIEW instruction
  Verify: grep -q 'escalate_review' plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-light.md
- [ ] Standard reviewer contains ESCALATE_REVIEW instruction
  Verify: grep -q 'escalate_review' plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-standard.md
